purpose: Implement story-scoped changes on dedicated branches using the approved contract, tests, and knowledge base context.
outputs: Versioned workflow definition and event-sourced instance engine.
Four built-in presets for software projects, change requests, technical assessments, and generic governed processes.
Human-readable CLI commands and backward-compatible assessment behavior.
validation: decision and assumption changes are recorded
no unauthorized tool or resource use
Unit and integration tests cover definition reachability, replay integrity, idempotency, concurrency, allowlisted guards, overlay pinning, and all four presets.
Regression tests preserve the six SDLC phases, assessment two-checkpoint journey, stable JSON, help, and completion output in English and Italian.
npm run check, full npm test, doctor, package dry run, and strict-gate tamper tests pass.

contextualization.summary: Add a generic versioned workflow engine with four governed presets while preserving the six existing SDLC phases and the assessment two-checkpoint journey.

constraints: Definitions, overlays, instance headers, and event streams are immutable or append-only and hash-bound.
Custom guards are declarative allowlisted identifiers; no eval, dynamic import, shell, or arbitrary code.
Existing assessment v1 files, CLI output, schemas, JSON output, and two-checkpoint behavior remain compatible.

approvals.summary: Approve the exact workflow implementation brief under the delegated enterprise program: four governed presets, append-only hash-bound instances, allowlisted guards, and no assessment or six-phase regressions.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Autonomous completion of approved requirement REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 through the eight reserved local delivery stories only.
